title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 - 7 - 2017: Alexandrian Library

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief vlog update from Boulder, explaining he is on a multi-week project to catalog and video all books from the Greco-Roman world for his website. He also mentions planning to sell his car, nearly doing a Google Hangout with someone others warned is racist, and then signs off to get back to work.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited and motivated; wants to make the full body of Greco-Roman literature feel accessible on his website
Committed to selling it regardless of current distractions

stances.topic: potential Google Hangout with someone accused of racism
stances.position: Skeptical of the accusation given the person is a Syrian Muslim, open to helping him

transcript.text: Hey, Living in Boulder V-Log, it's 1.50 in the afternoon, Shki.
Yesterday I was doing a bunch of books, and today I'll do a bunch of books.
I think I want to do all of the Greco-Roman world, every single book from the Greco-Roman world on my website.
Because I can make it seem like it's not that much information and memorize all of it.
And then I can help others do the same.
So, this is going to go on for like a month or something.
I have to do a video in my van, but maybe I'll do it later on today.
I'm still kind of freaking out about my new project.
My new project of the books.
Because I'm making so much progress so quickly.
But I need to do the video soon.
But I am going to sell the car, no matter what.
I have to sell the car.
But I'm going to do these books.
That's all I'm going to do.
I'm listening to them as well as I'm doing them, and I'm learning a lot.
But I can't really remember which ones I do.
I listen to bits.
I listen to bits and pieces.
I don't know how to listen to books all the way through.
I was trying to do Livvy today, but I kept pausing.
So, anyways, that's all I have to say.
Anyway, I was going to do a Google Earth Hangout with one of my fans, a Syrian guy.
But now all these people are saying that I shouldn't do it because he's racist.
But maybe I could make him not be racist.
He's like a Syrian Muslim.
That's the last person who should be racist in America.
Maybe he just wants help.
Anyways, I don't really have anything to say anymore.
I'm just going to get to work now.
So, let's get it.
Let's get going.
Let's put the metal to the pedal to the metal and the rubber to the road.
